title: Trunks (Jase — guest player) — Druid ☠
bodyText:
A druid-scientist played by **Jase** (a guest player for a few sessions), **DECEASED [[session-13|S13]]** — died detonating every one of his own vials to save the party.

# Who he was
Found disguised as a crab inside the gelatinous cube (S10). A scientist living on the caves' border; kept himself sane with self-crafted vials; connected to [[cumb]] and **Mr. Spells** ([[spells-family]]).

# How he died
Walked into the dark alone (S12); found transformed into a half-dwarf half-shadow monstrosity beside a horned demon — and in the battle's darkest moment **drank every vial at once**, dying in an anti-magic explosion that nearly killed the party. Buried at [[kenas-grove|the grove]]'s edge (S14).

# What he left behind
- **[[velmir|Velmir]]**, his cursed shadow sword — [[pc-eddy|Eddy]] carries it (curse lifted by [[eira-cavernborn|Eira]]).
- **His journal**: experiments of all varieties; a section on meeting **Mr. Spells** (who helped create the vials); notes on his final experiments with **the strange pool/cube entity** — early [[the-pool]] research the party still holds.

> [!dm] Superseded plan, kept for the record: "Silus" was once Jake's planned next main — the grill sessions instead made **Silus canon as Eddy's soul** ([[pc-eddy]] trinity). Jake plays Eddy; it's **Kyle** rolling the new PC ([[arc-chapter-1]]).

# Threads
[[velmir]] · [[the-pool]] · [[spells-family]]
